title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
